description: Gameplay-derived tables in Postgres schema `game`: parsed log events, movement, round stats, CS2KZ mirror. Raw RCON/Loki ingest lives in schema `ops` (separate dashboard).

options.content:
### Game schema (`game`)
All panels query **`game.*`** only (separate from ops collection storage).
- **Game events** — parsed combat/chat/round lines.
- **Movement** — `BIOBASE_POS_JSON` ticks only.
- **Round stats** — CS2 JSON round blocks.
- **CS2KZ** — SQLite mirror (runs, jumpstats).

For **RCON samples, raw log lines, and status snapshots** see **Ops ingest** in the link above.

panels.description: Parsed server log events (game time = engine log prefix on the line).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT event_ts AS game_time,
       event_type,
       round_num,
       attacker_name,
       attacker_steamid,
       attacker_team,
       victim_name,
       victim_steamid,
       victim_team,
       weapon,
       headshot,
       extra_json
FROM   game.biobase_cs2_game_event
ORDER BY event_ts DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Game events (players & combat)

panels.description: Position / velocity samples from BIOBASE_POS_JSON log lines only.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(event_ts, sampled_at) AS game_time,
       tick,
       player_name,
       steamid,
       pos_x,
       pos_y,
       pos_z,
       vel_x,
       vel_y,
       vel_z,
       speed,
       yaw,
       pitch,
       on_ground,
       extra_json
FROM   game.biobase_cs2_movement_sample
ORDER BY COALESCE(event_ts, sampled_at) DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Movement (coordinates & velocity)

panels.description: Per-player cumulative stats when CS2 emits JSON_BEGIN … JSON_END round_stats.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COALESCE(event_ts, recorded_at) AS game_time,
       round_number,
       map,
       score_t,
       score_ct,
       slot_index,
       accountid,
       team,
       money,
       kills,
       deaths,
       assists,
       dmg,
       hsp,
       kdr,
       adr,
       mvp,
       ef,
       ud,
       kills_3k,
       kills_4k,
       kills_5k,
       clutchk,
       firstk,
       pistolk,
       sniperk,
       blindk,
       bombk,
       firedmg,
       uniquek,
       dinks,
       chickenk
FROM   game.biobase_cs2_round_stats
ORDER BY COALESCE(event_ts, recorded_at) DESC NULLS LAST, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Round stats (per player)

panels.description: CS2KZ Times table mirrored from local SQLite (per ingest session).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ingested_at,
       map_name,
       course_name,
       mode_name,
       run_time,
       teleports,
       steamid64,
       time_id,
       metadata
FROM   game.biobase_cs2kz_run
ORDER BY ingested_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: CS2KZ runs (Times)

panels.description: CS2KZ Jumpstats mirrored from local SQLite.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ingested_at,
       steamid64,
       jump_type,
       mode_name,
       distance,
       strafes,
       sync,
       pre,
       jump_air_max,
       airtime,
       jumpstat_id
FROM   game.biobase_cs2kz_jumpstat
ORDER BY ingested_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: CS2KZ jumpstats

title: Game data (parsed + CS2KZ)
